name: PAID INC
business: PAID, Inc. provides a comprehensive e-commerce platform for small to medium enterprises, including shipping coordination and label generation services through its ShipTime platform and e-commerce tools such as PaidPayments, PaidCart, PaidShipping, and PaidWeb. The company generates revenue primarily from shipping coordination and label generation services, with over 109,300 members.

exposures.sentence: The Company has developed a full line of SaaS-based business services including PaidPayments, PaidCart, PaidShipping and PaidWeb.
ShipTime s platform provides its members with the ability to quote, process, generate labels, track and dispatch shipments.

PaidPayments provides businesses with a secure and efficient way to conduct online transactions including a virtual terminal, invoicing capability, subscriptions processing, checkout pages, and a point-of-sale system.
